recipe.title: Rustic Roasted Tomato and Potato Medley
ingredients: 2 large potatoes (about 1.5 lbs), such as Russet or Yukon Gold
1 lb ripe tomatoes (e.g., Roma, cherry, or a mix)
1 teaspoon dried oregano or Italian seasoning (optional)
instructions: Wash the potatoes thoroughly. You can peel them if desired, or leave the skin on for a more rustic texture. Cut the potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
Wash the tomatoes. If using large tomatoes, cut them into 1-inch chunks. If using cherry tomatoes, you can leave them whole or halve them.
Peel and chop the onion into similar sized pieces as the potatoes.
Peel and mince the garlic cloves.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cubed potatoes, chopped tomatoes, chopped onion, and minced garlic.
Drizzle the olive oil over the vegetables. Add the salt, black pepper, and dried oregano (if using). Toss everything together until all vegetables are evenly coated with the oil and seasonings.
Spread the seasoned vegetables in a single layer on a large baking sheet. Ensure they are not overcrowded; use two baking sheets if necessary to allow for even roasting and browning.

Roast in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes, stirring the vegetables halfway through the cooking time. Continue roasting until the potatoes are tender and lightly golden, and the tomatoes have softened and begun to caramelize.
Remove from the oven and serve hot as a delicious side dish or a light vegetarian main.
